User.title: User Profile
User.description: Store player profiles, stats, Standoff 2 game ID, and account permission roles.

avatarUrl.description: Url of the player's avatar graphic.

role.description: Role of the user, such as 'user', 'admin', or 'verified_host'.

joinedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the player registered.

aimReactionBest.description: Best time in milliseconds for the aiming and reaction training.

aimAccuracyBest.description: Highest accuracy scored in the target reaction training.

sprayAccuracyBest.description: Highest match rating in spray control training.

Lobby.title: Standoff 2 Lobby
Lobby.description: Lobby entries created by host players for other users to view and join.

creatorId.description: The UID of the host player.

creatorName.description: Gaming nickname of the lobby host.

creatorStandoffId.description: Standoff 2 numeric ID of the lobby host.

creatorIsVerified.description: Whether the host is a Verified Host or Admin on the platform.

map.description: The map selected for this match (e.g. 'Sandstone', 'Province', 'Rust').

lobbyCode.description: Standoff 2 standard numeric lobby/room code (e.g. 481958) that hosts give to players.

joinedPlayerCount.description: Current number of declared joiners inside the app.

description.description: Lobby description or specific rule guidelines.

Admin.title: Admin Record
Admin.description: Simple document marking UI admin status for the UID.

/users/{userId}.description: Player profiles stored by user ID.
